businesses.name: Sai Electricals
businesses.tagline: 24x7 electrician support for homes, shops, and offices.
businesses.description: Sai Electricals provides wiring setup, MCB repair, inverter installation, and electrical safety inspections for homes and commercial properties. The team focuses on quick response, transparent pricing, and same-day service in core Pune localities.

services.name: Home Wiring and Rewiring
services.description: Complete rewiring for homes, flats, and offices with safety checks.

services.name: MCB and Distribution Board Repair
services.description: Fault isolation, MCB replacement, load balancing, and DB maintenance.

services.name: Inverter and UPS Installation
services.description: Installation, wiring, and troubleshooting for backup power systems.

faqs.question: Do you provide emergency electrical support?
faqs.answer: Yes, emergency visits are available in Pune service areas depending on technician availability.

faqs.question: Do you provide GST invoices?
faqs.answer: Yes, GST invoices are provided for all paid service jobs.

policies.cancellationPolicy: No cancellation fee if cancelled at least 1 hour before technician dispatch.
